directors.name: Todd A. Becker
directors.bio_summary: Becker has served as President and CEO of Green Plains since January 2009 and was appointed as a director in March 2009. He previously served as CEO of VBV LLC and as Executive Vice President of Sales and Trading at Global Ethanol. Prior to that, he worked for ten years at ConAgra Foods in various management positions.

directors.name: Thomas Manuel
directors.bio_summary: Manuel has been a director since May 2015 and serves as CEO and Founder of Nu-Tek Food Science LLC since August 2011. He previously served as CEO of Aventine Renewable Energy and held senior management positions at ConAgra Foods from 1977 to 2002. He also served as Managing Director of International Strategy Advisors, LLC.

directors.name: Brian Peterson
directors.bio_summary: Peterson has been a director since May 2005 and currently serves as President and CEO of Whiskey Creek Enterprises. He previously served as Green Plains' Executive Vice President in charge of site development and was the sole founder and owner of Superior Ethanol LLC, which was acquired by Green Plains in 2006.

directors.name: Alain Treuer
directors.bio_summary: Treuer has been a director since October 2008 and Vice Chairman of the Board since August 2015. He is Chairman and CEO of Tellac Reuert Partners (TRP SA), a global investment firm, a position he has held since 2005. He was a founder of VBV LLC and previously served as Chairman and CEO of TIGC, a global telecommunications company.

directors.name: James Crowley
directors.bio_summary: Crowley has been a director since October 2008 and serves as Chairman and Managing Partner of Old Strategic, LLC since July 2006. His prior experience includes serving as Chairman and Managing Partner of Strategic Research Institute and President of Global Investment and Merchant Banking at Prudential Securities. He currently serves on the board and is Chairman of the Nominating and Governance Committee of Core Molding Technologies.

directors.name: Gene Edwards
directors.bio_summary: Edwards has been a director since June 2014 and served as Executive Vice President and Chief Development Officer of Valero Energy Corporation until his retirement in April 2014, where he spent a 32-year career. He served on the board of CST Brands, Inc. from May 2013 to December 2013.

directors.name: Gordon Glade
directors.bio_summary: Glade has been a director since December 2007 and was formerly a shareholder and President and CEO of Amur Equipment Financing (formerly AXIS Capital Inc.) from 1996 to 2016. He currently serves as Vice President and a director of the Edgar and Frances Reynolds Foundation, Inc. and as a director of Heartland Agriculture, LLC and the Brunswick State Bank.

directors.name: Jim Anderson
directors.bio_summary: Anderson has been a director since October 2008 and is currently CEO of Moly-Cop since November 2017. He previously served as Managing Director and Operating Partner at CHAMP Private Equity, and as President and CEO of The Gavilon Group, LLC. He also served as CEO of United Malt Holdings and held senior roles at ConAgra Foods.

directors.name: Wayne Hoovestol
directors.bio_summary: Hoovestol has been a director since March 2006 and has served as Chairman of the Board since October 2008. He previously served as Green Plains' CEO from February 2007 to December 2008 and began operating Hoovestol Inc., a trucking company, in 1978. He is also President of Lone Mountain Truck Leasing, which he founded in 2005.

directors.name: Ejnar Knudsen
directors.bio_summary: Knudsen joined the company as a director in May 2016 and is the founder and CEO of AGR Partners. He previously served as co-portfolio manager of Passport Capital's Agriculture Fund from 2009 to 2012, EVP of Western Milling, and spent 10 years with Rabobank. He currently serves as a director of Ridley Corp. (RIC.ASX).

directors.name: Kimberly Wagner
directors.bio_summary: Wagner joined the company as a director in October 2020 and is the founder of TBGD Partners, a boutique firm providing expertise to early and mid-stage ventures. She has been a Venture Partner at Flagship Pioneering and President and COO of CIBO Technologies. Prior to that she was a Partner at McKinsey & Co. and a Senior Partner and Managing Director at The Boston Consulting Group.

executive_officers.name: Todd A. Becker
executive_officers.title: President and Chief Executive Officer (and Director)

executive_officers.name: Michelle S. Mapes
executive_officers.title: Chief Legal and Administration Officer and Corporate Secretary

extraction_notes: All directors and executive officers were clearly identified in the proxy with ages, tenures, and biographical details. Knudsen is listed as not independent per the Board's determination stated in the proxy. Hoovestol is also listed as not independent. Tenure years for directors were calculated from the year first mentioned as joining the board through 2021. Wagner's tenure is listed as 0 as she joined in October 2020 (less than one full year). Ejnar Knudsen's directorships at Opal Foods and Materra Farming are not listed as public companies; only Ridley Corp. (RIC.ASX) is explicitly a publicly listed company. For executive officer tenure, years were calculated from the date of their current role.
